mapper.select: SELECT id, type, label_name, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM dict_label_options WHERE type = #{type} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT id, type, label_name, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM dict_label_options WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY type, sort ASC
SELECT id, type, label_name, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM dict_label_options WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY type, sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dict_label_options (type, label_name, sort, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{type}, #{labelName}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW())
